name: NodeGoat A1 — NoSQL injection via $where string interpolation in allocations search

provenance.note: Inverted the documented fix in getByUserIdAndThreshold: replaced the structured query with the original $where template-literal that interpolates the unsanitised threshold.

notes: MongoDB $where executes server-side JS; unsanitised threshold enables operator/JS injection. NodeGoat A1 Injection.
